_note: Synthetic job postings. All URLs are IANA-reserved *.example.org hosts and every HN objectID is out-of-range (99xxxxxxxx), so nothing here can ever resolve to real content (fixture-provenance rule).

remoteok.legal: synthetic fixture stand-in for the RemoteOK legal notice entry

remoteok.description: We keep hand-rolling brittle point-to-point integrations between our billing, CRM and support stack. You will own a unified sync layer because nothing off the shelf handles our compliance constraints.
Third automation hire this year: our ops team drowns in manual reconciliation between spreadsheets and our ERP. Existing tools stop at the demo stage.
Build internal tooling for audit evidence collection. We evaluated every vendor in the space and none support our regulator's export format.

weworkremotely.title: Acmeflow: Customer Data Pipeline Engineer
weworkremotely.description: Own the pipeline that unifies customer events across five SaaS tools. We are hiring because the connector products we tried silently drop records.

weworkremotely.title: Northbeam Health: Patient Intake Automation Specialist
weworkremotely.description: Digitize and automate clinic intake forms. Every off-the-shelf option fails our HIPAA workflow review, so we are building in-house.

hn_hiring.author: fixture_founder
hn_hiring.comment_text: Acmeflow | Senior Integrations Engineer | Remote | Full-time. We keep hiring for the same role because reliable cross-tool sync for regulated data simply does not exist off the shelf.

hn_hiring.comment_text: Ledgerly | Compliance Tooling Engineer | Remote (US) | We tried three vendors for audit-evidence automation and ended up building internally; come own that platform.
